name: PDF Studio
summary: A free, open-source PDF editor for Mac that compresses, merges, converts, and signs PDFs entirely on your own computer — no uploads, no account, no subscription.

name: Case Gym
summary: A practice environment for case interviews and structured decision-making drills — built to train the muscle of clear, fast, defensible reasoning under pressure.

name: Super Cards
summary: A tool for comparing and optimizing credit card decisions — built from the inside knowledge of how card pricing and rewards actually work.
